title: Unemployed youngsters in law like cockroaches; take to social media, RTI activism: CJI Surya Kant
description: Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant on Friday expressed concern over unemployed young lawyers drifting away from practice toward social media and RTI activism, remarking that such "youngsters like cockroaches" were becoming parasites in society.The Bench also comprising Justice Joymalya Bagchi hearing a petition filed by a lawyer, advocate Sanjay Dube, seeking contempt of court action over Delhi High Court's delay in implementing the Senior Advocate designation guidelines laid down by the Su
